name: Progressive Planet Solutions Inc.
summary: Progressive Planet Solutions Inc., a junior mineral exploration company, engages in the acquisition and exploration of mineral properties in Canada. Its flagship property is the Z1 Zeolite mine located to the northeast of Cache Creek, British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Ashburton Ventures Inc. and changed its name to Progressive Planet Solutions Inc. in June 2018. Progressive Planet Solutions Inc. was incorporated in 2006 and is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
